problem_text_cn: 质量为M、长2L的均匀细杆用长l的轻绳竖直悬挂，静止时对细杆下端施水平短冲量J。1. 画出运动开始时刻绳与杆的偏离图；2. 求开始时刻绳的角速度θ̇和杆的角速度φ̇；3. 求最大摆角时θ和φ的关系。
problem_text_en: A uniform thin rod of mass M and length 2L is vertically suspended by a light string of length l. When at rest, a horizontal short impulse J is applied to the lower end of the rod. 1. Draw the deviation diagram of the string and the rod at the moment the motion starts；2. Find the angular velocity θ̇ of the string and the angular velocity φ̇ of the rod at the initial moment；3. Find the relationship between θ and φ at the maximum swing angle.
problem_solution_cn: （1）初始运动分析：- 杆受冲量后绕瞬时轴O转动，O距质心C的距离x=L/3，初始偏离图为杆绕O点转动，绳随杆偏转。（2）角速度计算：- 由动量定理J=Mv_C，角动量定理J(L+x)=Iω，得φ̇=3J/(ML)，再由几何关系φ̇=-3lθ̇/(2L)，解得θ̇=-2J/(Ml)。（3）最大摆角关系：- 初始动能Eₖ₀=2J²/M，机械能守恒得lcosθ + Lcosφ = l + L - 2J²/(M²g)。
problem_solution_en: （1）Initial motion analysis：- After receiving the impulse, the rod rotates around an instantaneous axis O, where the distance from O to the center of mass C is x=L/3. The initial deviation diagram shows the rod rotating around O, with the string deflecting with the rod。（2）Angular velocity calculation：- From the momentum theorem J=Mv_C and the angular momentum theorem J(L+x)=Iω, we get φ̇=3J/(ML). From the geometric relation φ̇=-3lθ̇/(2L), solving gives θ̇=-2J/(Ml)。（3）Relationship at maximum swing angle：- Initial kinetic energy Eₖ₀=2J²/M, conservation of mechanical energy gives lcosθ + Lcosφ = l + L - 2J²/(M²g)。
problem_answer: 1. 偏离图见解析；2. 绳的角速度$\dot{		heta}=-rac{2J}{Ml}$，杆的角速度$\dot{\v\phi}=rac{3J}{ML}$；3. 最大摆角关系$l\cos		heta + L\cos\v\phi = l + L -  rac{2J^2}{M^2 g}{$}
